prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, let's get this done! I know you've been putting this off, but now is the time to tackle it head-on. Remember, you're capable, strong, and determined. You've faced challenges before and come out on top. This task is no different. Break it down into smaller steps, focus on one at a time, and celebrate each accomplishment. Don't let procrastination rob you of the satisfaction of completing this task. You got this!
